scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply lms-db --remote --config backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy: npm run db:migrate:remote && wrangler deploy --config backend/wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:prod:
echo '
✗ Direct wrangler deploy --config backend/wrangler.toml --env production INTERDIT. Use:
  python -m Apps.the-play-button.tpb-cock.agent.scripts.tpb_cli --target production deploy-release-train deploy lms
or:
  python -m Apps.the-play-button.tpb-cock.agent.scripts.tpb_cli promote worker lms --to production' && exit 1
